title: Tale of Sim Cheong: Filial Piety
description: A blind man's daughter sacrifices herself to the sea gods to restore her father's sight — Korea's greatest tale of filial devotion.
introduction: A blind man's daughter sacrifices herself to the sea gods to restore her father's sight — Korea's greatest tale of filial devotion.

translation.text: Sim Cheong threw herself into the sea. The Dragon King was moved by her devotion. He placed her in a lotus flower and sent her back to the surface. When her father touched the flower, his eyes opened for the first time.
